zh.lifeSummary: 當John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres於1402年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾時，他的父親William de Lindsay50歲，母親Christiana Keith39歲。他於1425年與Joan Agnes Byres Stewart在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他於1457年在蘇格蘭被列為justiciar。他去世於1482年2月6日在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安哈丁頓享年80歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres于1402年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾时，他的父亲William de Lindsay50岁，母亲Christiana Keith39岁。他于1425年与Joan Agnes Byres Stewart在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和10个女儿的父母。他于1457年在苏格兰被列为justiciar。他去世于1482年2月6日在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安哈丁頓享年80岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres was born in 1402, in Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, William de Lindsay, was 50 and his mother, Christiana Keith, was 39. He married Joan Agnes Byres Stewart in 1425, in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 10 daughters. In 1457, at the age of 55, his occupation is listed as justiciar in Scotland. He died on 6 February 1482, in Haddington, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres est né en 1402, à Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, William de Lindsay, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Christiana Keith, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Joan Agnes Byres Stewart en 1425, à Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 10 filles. En 1457, à l’âge de 55 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justiciar à Écosse. Il est décédé le 6 février 1482, à Haddington, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres 1402 in Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Lindsay 50 und seine Mutter Christiana Keith 39. Er hat 1425 in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Joan Agnes Byres Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 10 Töchter. 1457, als er 55 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justiciar in Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 6. Februar 1482 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Haddington, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres è nato il nel 1402 nel Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William de Lindsay, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Christiana Keith, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Joan Agnes Byres Stewart nel 1425, nel Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 10 figlie. Nel 1457, all'età di 55 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justiciar nel Scotland. Morì il 6 febbraio 1482, nel Haddington, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byresが1402年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Lindsayは50歳，母Christiana Keithは39歳であった。1425年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハッドイントンでJoan Agnes Byres Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。1457年，55歳の時，スコットランドでの職業はjusticiarと記録されている。彼は1482年2月6日にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンハッドイントンで80歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres(이)가 1402년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Lindsay(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Christiana Keith(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1425년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하딩턴에서 Joan Agnes Byres Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 1457년, 55세의 나이로 그의 직업은 스컷랜드에서 justiciar이었다. 그는 1482년 2월 6일 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 하딩턴에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres nasceu em 1402, em Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, William de Lindsay, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Christiana Keith, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Agnes Byres Stewart em 1425, em Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 10 filhas. Em 1457, com 55 anos, sua profissão aparece como justiciar em Scotland. Ele faleceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1482, em Haddington, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres родился в 1402 г. в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William de Lindsay было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Christiana Keith, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Agnes Byres Stewart в 1425 г. в местности хаддингтон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 10 дочерей. В 1457 году, в возрасте 55 лет,  он работал по профессии justiciar в местности Шотландия. Он умер 6 февраля 1482 г. в местности хаддингтон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres nació en 1402, en Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, William de Lindsay, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Christiana Keith, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Joan Agnes Byres Stewart en 1425, en Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 10 hijas. En 1457, a la edad de 55 años, su ocupación registrada era justiciar en Scotland. Murió el 6 de febrero de 1482, en Haddington, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Escocia, Reino Unido.
